title: Slots: Reoutlined
description: Improves GUI slot outlines featuring redesigned armor slots and a new offhand slot.
body:
# Slots: Reoutlined
*Refines GUI slot outlines throughout Minecraft for improved consistency and intuitive visual cues. Armor slots have been redesigned to better match their corresponding equipment items, while the shield slot has been transformed into a more versatile offhand slot featuring a hand icon. All outline colors have been carefully adjusted to integrate seamlessly with vanilla UI aesthetics.*

## Features
  - Retextured various slot outlines for better recognition
  - Redesigned armor slot icons to match their actual equipment
  - Converted shield slot to a versatile offhand slot with hand icon
  - Adjusted outline coloration for improved vanilla UI integration

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
